name: Pane Giallo (Polenta Bread)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small skillet over moderately low heat, melt 2 tablespoons of butter.
2. Add garlic and sauté until fragrant. Remove from heat.
3. Combine polenta, salt, and pepper in a bowl and set aside.
4. Put egg yolks, milk, and half and half in a saucepan and whisk well.
5. Bring to a boil, whisking constantly.
6. Add cornmeal mixture gradually, then add garlic and red peppers.
7. Cook 2 minutes stirring constantly with a wooden spoon.
8. Add remaining butter and cook an additional 2 minutes.
9. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
10. Brush soufflé dish or casserole with olive oil. Place in oven for 5 minutes to warm.
11. Beat egg whites with a pinch of salt until stiff peaks form.
12. Gently fold whites into the thickened cornmeal mixture.
13. Pour mixture into hot soufflé dish.
14. Bake until puffed and golden, about 30 minutes. Serve immediately.
